title: Louisiana Health Care Professionals Reporting Act
doc_html:
PART VII-A.  LOUISIANA HEALTH CARE

PROFESSIONALS REPORTING ACT

§1745.11.  Louisiana Health Care Professionals Reporting Act

This Part may be cited as the "Louisiana Health Care Professionals Reporting Act".

Acts 2007, No. 274, §1.
